2014-12-07 14:36:39
created guild commerce FW doc to capture revisions

BID ON GUILD TRADER
I'm understanding this flow better now. The way its presented needs to be more modal - UI needs to be broken out into more independent panels.
-	Which Guild
-	How Much (to bid)
-	When does the bidding end?
-	Have I been outbid?

I ran into a bug when I joined another guild from within the UI. Restarted the game to see if it corrects itself

I'm not seeing the point of bidding - when I place a higher bid with a different guild and return to the guild that placed the lower bid, I see no indication that I've been outbid - testing on PC-UI to see how that works. It works the same way there.

My problem with this interaction, which seems to be as-designed is that if I can't see that I've been outbid, I have no reason to update my bid. I'm also not seeing a record of my bidding activity on the Guild BUG (on PC or Console). Suggest that the Guild Trader section of the Guild HUB UI be updated to show that a bid has been placed (amount, time remaining, outbid warning)
-	In the guild list I need to see that a guild has placed a bid, without having to select that guild (show the bid amount)
-	In the guild list I need to see that a guild has been outbid (color code the bid amount red)
-	I need to know when the bidding has concluded without having to return to the guild HUB screen or a specific guild traded (suggest that we show this as a system message in-game)
-	I need to know the name of my Guild Trader and where to find him on the map

I'm unable to advance time to see what happens when the bidding ends (bidding closes in 15 hours)
-	Ask QA if its possible to force this condition

Hiring workflow is awkward, needs to be streamlines as mentiond for HIRE GUILD TRADER

2014-12-10 09:49:13
finished guild bank design revision. writing up feedback for it.

GUILD BANK
	-	ITEM LIST
		-	implemet "empty list" use case as specified in design doc

	-	DEPOSIT/WITHDRAW ITEMS
		-	Use a transition upon depositing or withdrawing an item.
			-	upon selection, item dissolves to opacity = 0
			-	after selected item dissolves, the list shifts to fill the empty space

	-	GUILD SELECTION MENU
		-	(confluence reference)
		-	Title should read "Change Guild"
		-	Message text in panel header should read "Select a guild to view its bank"
		-	Update vertical list placement and content as shown in design doc
		-	Guild icons should scale larger for focused entry
		-	Place a checkmark next to the currently selected guild

	-	HINTBAR
		-	Order and label hintbar icons as specified in design doc
			-	BACK should be placed after CONFIRM
			-	Hintbar Text for guild selection should read "Change Guild"
			-	Hintbar text should state "Deposit Item" and "Withdraw Item"

	-	STATS
			-	order and label stat values as shown in the design doc

	-	DEPOSIT/WITHDRAW GOLD
		-	I've revised the deposit/withdraw gold interaction. These activities now happen in a modal dialog

GUILD HUB
	-	Guild Hub layout needs to be adjusted to include Bank Gold label/value pair in panel header (confluence)

GUILD TRADER

I've changed the interaction design for Hiring/Bidding on Guild Trader to support a modal approach to guild selection and bidding/hiring. The navigation was very similar to the PC-UI and in general I found that using a dropdown menu to conditionally show content within a vertical list wasn't working well.

	-	BID ON GUIILD TRADER

	-	HIRE GUILD TRADER
		-	Guild Selection and hiring in a single panel feels awkward. I've revised this interaction to use a more wizard-like modal approach
		-	use the revised Guild Selection & Hiring flow flow specified in design doc (confluence)

	-	HIRING CONFIRMATION DIALOG
		-	Eliminate this dialog so that the Hire is made upon confirming the amount after data entry

reviewing Guild Store Mananager

LISTINGS
-	ITEM LIST
	-	Item list placement should match that of inventory
	-	Supplemental typography for line items is too small
		-	devise a method of showing the seller and time left for each listing more cleanly
		-	should this use the roster list pattern?
	-	Difficult to tell which line item I'm looking at
	-	List scrolling behavior is strange
		-	when I scroll through items, the item labels are animating in response to the icon scaling behavior of the focused item
	-	no affordance provided for sorting by name & time left
	-	interacting with sorting fields with scroll-left and scroll-right to switch focus between sorting fields (press confirm to sort) isn't working well. hard to discover, although easy enough to do once discovered
		-	It clutters the list layout and makes it awkward
	-	Using R3 to toggle between sorting criteria IS working well. Feels obvious, and is gratifying to see the list update. Has the additional benefit of not requiring a confirmation
		-	we will use that mechanic here and elsewhere to toggle short lists of sort criteria
		-	I'm assuming this method doesn't work as well for longer sort criteria, such as Roster & COntacts
			-	need to take another look at the roster design and see if toggle-sorting can apply there as well

what was learned today? Frame the problems in a way that address user needs rather than visual requirements
. How does that work for the Guilds screen?

PROBLEM
There are too many interaction pmethods going on at one time in the various subscreens. If I page between subscreens I feel disoriented when I back out of the screen even though it was my original starting point


SOLUTION
Use a Hub-Based or dropdown navigation pattern and acces each subscreen individually.

BROWSE

	FILTER LIST
	-	Vertical List layout does not correspond with design template. I've specified the layout and behavior of the widgets in the list in greater detail for your reference (see confluence)

	-	Dropdown menu widget is behaving incorrectly and is using PC-style assets. Check the intended layout and behavior on confluence
	(link to confluence dropdown menu doc)

	-	Show complete numerical value (unabbreviated) in the Min/Max currency widgets

	-	Due to the nature of the parametric list, its difficult to get a big picture of my search criteria. I prefer not to create a speciali



	SEARCH RESULTS & LISTINGS
	-	We're forcing too much content into a small space. I'm having a hard time reading the content in the results list. This screen would benefit from a 2 panel + tooltip layout, similar to what we use for Quest Journal, Guilds, etc...



	-	Toggling the Sort state using R3 works well on its own. However I feel we are complicating


	-	Don't show the "name" and "price" headinsgs above the item list


	GUILD SELECTION OPTIONS MENU
	-	The transition to the option menu where players switch guilds is disruptive and feels awkward. I've noticed this behavior for options menus in general where a new panel transitions in on top of the old panel and dims the screen behind it.
		-	I would prefer instead to see the content transition out, and be replaced by the items in the option menu - the panel itself should remain stationary
		-	The screen does not need to be dimmed when this (or any other) options menu is displayed

	HINTBAR
	-	The SELECT label should be drawn before the BACK label. Please reference the hintbar design doc for placement & ordering (link to confluence hintbar design doc)

	- the "GUILD" label should instead state: "SELECT GUILD"
	- the "SUBMIT" label should instad state "SEARCH NOW"

2015-01-21 10:44:45
The way I phrased my intent in the meeting invite is straightforward. Thats' what I need to stick to - on the create/problem solving side

What I expect to gain from the meeeting is:
-	aesthetic/consumer-based reactions
-	scope
	-	how much effort is involved in applying these changes
	-	how do these changes relate to the consistency review Ken has been putting together?
	-	do these changes conflict with any other agendas?
-	Priority and scheduling
-	Who will be involved with these changes
-	How can I expedite these changes?
	-	Is there anything else I need to provide?


Over the past 2 weeks, I’ve been reviewing work and speaking with Jared, Erich and Paul about concerns and proposed solutions to ongoing UX and visual quality issues. This meeting is to talk about the final stretch of our development efforts.

Some of you have already seen bits and pieces of the work samples in question. I hope you’ll recognize that I’m speaking about commercially-driven refinements to the design, not a radical rethink of what’s already working. The work I’ll introduce is informed by the opportunities and limitations provided by our existing design templates.

Agenda
I’ll be showing A/B comparisons of in-game vs. desired that address 3 fundamental concerns:
•	Where am I/What can I do next?
•	Localization
•	Readability

The solutions I’ve designed primarily involve:
•	Visual language refinements to UI panels
•	Refinements to list formatting to better support long/localized content
•	panel headers/paging nav
•	font sizing for tooltips & data values
•	the hintbar
•	modal dialogs

Takeaway
•	Scope
•	Priority
•	Task Ownership/Assignment

looking at Paul's work on Guilds

GUILD FEEDBACK

-	navigating through to set rank permissions feels very slippery, was easy to use with dpad - feeling that analog stick motion needs to be constrained further on this

-	navigating color list in Guild Heraldry feels amazing. Very smooth. FLuid & controllable.

-	selected color is communicated well. wondering if the checkmark can be bigger? concerned abiout readabilkity from a distance

-	have never felt good about the "feature Cost" label on this screen. Every feature costs the same, so why show that at all. Instead, we should show "Cost to Guild" here, as this is the actiomable quantity. Lets also remove the cost value from the hintbar label.


- In Heraldry - when I'm selecting a color or pattern, make the "Select" option on the hintbar dim when focused on the current selection instead of hiding

-	The icons in the STYLE sections of background & Crest seem small. Concerned about readability. What is the actual asset size?

-	In Guild History, confirming into a state where I can page through non-interactive content feels like an unnecessary step. Would like to provide support for paging w LT/RT at all times

-	Guild History font size is too small needs to be ZoFontGamepad34 or larger

-	GUILD SELECT SCREEN
-	Transition from Guild Select to Guild Options and back needs to be directional. Look at the Item options transition on the inventory screen as an examplee of this

-	LEAVE GUILD CONFIRMATION DIALOG

QUICKSLOT UI FAILED ME IN COMBAT
150128-000698
the quick slot would not work during combat despite repeated efforts to get it to proc. It worked fine out of combat.


PROBLEMS WITH MOUNTS/STABLE
	150128-000664
	WhenI logged in for first time- I mounted my horse and was riding the Painted one with spots- but i have never bought this horse. when i looked in my collectables the sspottd one was checked but also said locked.

	150128-000510
	The new riding skill does not reflect the +10 bonus to stamina that was provided by the 42K black horse. I'm assuming this is true for the speed and carrying capacity mounts as well. We were promised that we wouldn't lose any gain we had received by buying and upgrading our mounts before this change

	150128-000734
	Logged into existing character. Had a mount that I never owned. I used a wayshrine and now I have no mount and my camera was reset upon using the wayshrine as well. Visit stable and have no mount.

	150128-000759
	The bonuses we bought with expensive horses on live do not show up in the riding skills.

	(From PTS Bugs & Issues Thread on Forums)
	When I log in to a character that had been using a horse to increase bag capacity, that character is not using the horse, and items that were above their personal storage capacity are gone.

	150128-000547
	When you first log into the new mount system, you don't have a mount equipped. If you were using a mount for extra carrying capacity and are over your new capacity, then it looks like some of your inventory gets deleted. Also, when you first equip a mount with the new system, your max inventory count in the inventory screen doesn't update until you go to your bank

	150128-000533
	I was able to mount a midnight steed which I don't own. This appears to be because neither of the two horses I do own was set active when I mounted. After a smount is set active the mindnight steed is no longer available.

	150128-000499
	Prior to update 6 I had two mounts on my main--one Imperial and one Palomino. Both had custom names. After the update only the Imperial horse had the custom name. The palomino was in the stable if that matters. Thanks!

INCONSISTENT STACKABLES
150128-000552
All items in bank and inventory now stack to 200 which is great!! thank you, but the bait items such as crawlers, worms, insect parts etc. are not stacking to 200. Is there a particular reason for this?



PROBLEM WITH GUILD STORE?
150128-000744
I bought a set piece 'fang of the Viper' Purple, VR 14 from a guild store and it was send to me before the copy. The mail and the dagger are there, and I can take the dagger into my inventory, but I can't improve it. it doesn't show up in the improvement window. I am 100% sure improving this item is possible on live, because I did exactly that just yesterday.


POOR FEEDBACK/LATENCY ISSUE WHEN EQUIPPING ITEMS
150128-000749
Equiping new gear works fine, but it takes a long time until it actually shows on the character. I just equiped a completly new set of gear and it showed me running around in my old gear and took several tabs in an out of my inventory until the gear changed


VISUAL FIDELITY ISSUE (HAVE NOT SEEN THIS, CAN REPRO?)
150128-000745

AM I A CRIMINAL OR NOT?
150128-000714
Happened 3x so far. Get notification that I an no longer going to be chased by the law to almost immediately get a notification that I a going to be. Can't tell what i did or whta is going on. Relly needs to be some sort of crime blotter so i know what i did and what crime they are pursuing me for/not for/for. So basically it says i will not be pursued then i will be killed on sight in a matter of seconds without me doing anything.

2015-02-05 17:34:32
looking at PS4 with and without external keyboard setup for text entry. Using Character Create as reference

-	With Keyboard
	-	I choose to FINISH my character
	-	a focused text field is provided
		-	I can (sort of) tell its focused because there's a blinking cursor within
	-	Anything I type is shown in the text field
	-	When I press CONFIRM or ENTER, the text is registered and I move forward in the navigation flow
	-	When I press CANCEL or ESC the text field loses focus, but I'm still in the panel withthe text field
		-	If I want to enter text again, I have to press the EDIT option from the hintbar

-	With gamepad
	-	I choose to FINISH my character
	-	a focused text field is provided
		-	I can (sort of) tell its focused because there's a blinking cursor within
		-	The On Screen Keyboard appears
	-	I enter text into the Onscreen keyboard
		-	When I press R2 (PS4) to finish text entry
			-
		-	When I press BACK (PS4)
			-	the textfield loses focus but I'm still in the panel with the text field
			-	if I want to enter text again, I choose the EDIT option from the hintbar
				-	If I press CONFIRM again, the system thinks I'm finishing up
					-	 If there's no text within the text field, I'll get an error message
					-	If there's text within the text field, it gets registered and I'll move forward in the navigation flow

2015-02-09 22:39:09

TEST PLAN

All players are in the same location with a wide range of items
)awardloottable 200

All players have 1000 Gold
)addmoney 10000

PRE-TRADING

1. How do I interact with other players?
Players find each other in-world and initiate contact

2. How do I invite someone to trade?
Player 1 initiates trade w Player 2

3. How do I accept a trade invitation?
Player 2 accepts trade request

TRADING
Note: UI Error on Coders upon screen entry. Same on XB/PS4?

1. How do I offer gold to another player?
Player 1 adds 500 gold to the trade request and submits offer
Player 2 acknowledges

2. How do I offer items to another player?
Player 2 a


POST-TRADING
1. How do I know that the trade was successful
System message is displayed in upper right. Who noticed it?

2. How much gold do I have now
Where do players go to find out how much gold they have? Inventory? CHarcater Screen?



TRADE DESIGN REVIEW

After adding items for trade it felt strange that I had to go back to the main trading hub.

Name, location & Level stats should be removed from the hintbar

PLAYER GOLD, INVENTORY CAPACITY AND ITEMS IN TRADE should be added to the hint bar

When adding items
? should panel header change to state: "Add Itemss?"
or is ther a cleaner way to add items?
Could the items be exposed in a dropdown list?
-	this would allow items to be added in-place rather than "going somewhere" to add them
-	this removes any need for an "items in trade" stat

Alternately: The hintbar for the items list can be changed to state:
ADD/CANCEL/DONE

Tooltip size feels very awkward. Is useful and interesting to compare items for trading, but not critical. There's njno requirement to show two item lists w tooltips at once

Items are shown in the Item List on the Trade UI should be shown in mixed case

Hint bar calls to action for Tradeing HUB should be
ADD/BACK/SUBMIT OFFER

Significant bug when viewing the other player's offer - unable to see the item list,- instead, seeing some kind of visual glitch. Am able to scroll through the items and see tooltip for them however.

The blue highlight fill appearing when I've submitted an offer or when the other player has submitted an offer looks very out of place. Find another way to convey the "submitted offer" state

Looking at the other players offer - the representation of gold looks like its in a focused state of that I could do something with it?
Need to show the attached gold differently

Strange item list configuration - its not obvious what my choices are:
Add Gold needs to be a Call to action
Focus hilite around ADD gold should't be visible when unfocused
attach items text & icon should resize on focus
attach item icon is scaling a small asset to be large

Currency widget behavior doesn't feel right. Not sure what my expectation is:
part of it is the color coding and lack of focus
-	focused number needs to be larger
-	active (unfocused) numbers should always be tan
-	any zero value numbers between the current focused number and the last entered or default number should be colored tan
-	focused number should always be white

Currency widget value should always be shown center aligned

Currency data entry with slider feels very slippery, constantly entering values in fields I didnt intend to

Keybinds during Add Gold data entry should state CONFIRM/CANCEL

Currently its possible for both players to complete a trade in which nothing is transferred between players. The language of the SECONDARY CONFIRMATION which initiates the trade can be made more specific:
Until something has been added to an offer, a player's SECONDARY CONFIRM should be dim
	-	if an offer is received while a player has added nothing to their own offer, the SECONDARY CONFIRM should state "ACCEPT TRADE"
	-	if anything is added to an offer, the SECONDARY CONFIRM should state "SUBMIT OFFER"
	-	If items/gold are removed from an offer and nothing is being offered, the SECONDARY CONFIRM should be dim, unless the other player has submitted an offer, in whiuch case the SECONDARY CONFIRM should state "ACCEPT TRADE"


Scrolling right to view the otherplayer's offer is taking some getting used to. There's no queing of any kind to suggest this behavior is available, and it seems like the only reason you'd need to do it in the first place is to see item descriptions of material they'd added

The dynamic of switching between a view of my offer and player 2's offer is an intertesting challenge. As it stands, the functionality to do so (scrolling left or right) is non-obvious.

I'm not so sure we have to hang on to the notion of seeing both offers simultanously. Instead we could toggle between them, so only one view was available at a time?
This could be done by including a call to action in the list "View PLAYER Name's offer"
I do not want to use Paging Nav to do this

alternately, the existing scheme might work if the panels were clearly labeled:

L1					R1
YOUR OFFER			PLAYER NAME'S OFFER

2015-02-11 18:11:22

PLAYER TRADING DESIGn REVIEW (CONTINUED)

This review is based on my own playtesting and a focus test conducted with 8 volunteers on 2/11/15. We were unable to test item trading at that time due to errors with the display of items in the other player’s offer list.

Pain Points
•	Players don’t know how to accept a trade offer (attach pic)

•	Players don’t know whether a trade has been successfully accomplished (attach pic)
o	In the case of trading gold, 75% of the test group was observed going to the inventory screen to check that gold had in fact been transferred successfully.

•	Using LS to switch between my offer and the other player’s offer caused confusion (attach pic)
o	I observed spurious triggering of the inwhen the interaction was spuriously triggered. Regrettably, the spurious triggering of the interaction is also the way people discovered that the interaction was possible

Right now you're feeling a bit schizopherecic. A lot of issues are competing for your attention and they all seem super important. You need to be thinking about what you can accomplish in 2 weeks, for console launch and for Day 1 patch. You're feeling stressy because nobody else seems to be fixating on issues you know are problematic. Here's what I suggest:

-	Identify known problem areas
-	Go through your own bug list and create stories to group them together
	-	are the problem areas represented here as bugs?
-	Go thru the UI bug list and see where repeated issues are happening
	-	are the problem areas represented here as bugs?
-	Figure out what you need to do to track progress on the HUD. It's feeling very open ended

2015-03-01 14:13:20
The Daggerfall Covenant
Surrounded by enemies, the bretons, redguards and orcs of the Iliac Bay have united to form the Daggerfall Covenant. They fight to protect their people and if possible to save all tamriel from the dire forces that threaten it

The Aldmeri Dominion
BBelieveing they can counter the threat to RTamriel, the Elder races have founded the Almeri Dominion. High Elves, Wood Elves, and the feloine Khajiithave formed an alliance of mysticism, cunning and ferocity

The Ebonheart Pact
The Ebonheart pact was forged in war when eatern Tamriel was invaded by the Akaviri. The Nords of Skyrim, Dark Elves of Morrowind and free Argonians united to oppose them. The pact endured and confronts new perils as one.




Breton
The racial skills of the Bretons reflect their affinity for the arcane, giving them bonuses to Magicka, Light Armor and Spell Resistance

Nightblade
Nightblades are adventurers and opportunists with a gift for getting in and out of trouble, relying variously on stealth, blades and speed, nightblades thrive on conflict and misfortune, trusting to their luck and cunning to survice




The racial skills of the Dark Elves reflect their intellect and natural agility, giving them bonuses in dual wielding, fire magic, and fire resistance.

The racial skills of the Nords reflect their strong and hardy natures, giving them bonuses with two-handed weapons, health regeneration, and frost resistance

These skillful Masters-At-Arms use the ancient Akaviri martial arts tradition of battle spirit and wield fearsome magic that pounds, shatters and physically alters the world around them

CROWN STORE FEEDBACK

In case you wanted them for reference from the earlier playtest:

•	Sound is really low for cycling through tiles.
•	Crowns icon is too small next to balance. It's smaller than the cost icons.
•	Buy Crowns dialogue has PlaystationStore with really large Restricted in circle symbol and no space between Playstation Store.
•	Inventory capacity kind of gives you a false impression that these items will go into inventory. Can make you think you can't purchase more.
•	Still need to fix camera rotation as it has too much acceleration.
•	When you are previewing a bundle that has only one thing to preview, the L2/R2 for Previous/Next show up but they're disabled.
•	Header for tooltips is different between single items and bundles. For bundles, they follow a different convention where the category of bundle is underneath the title, whereas individual items have the category of item above it.
•	You can't notice that there are more items below 6 tiles because the bar is way too subtle.
•	Going down when there's more than 6 tiles should work off of for any of the 3 tiles in the bottom visible row.
•	Cycling between previews (specifically mounts) looks silly because you sink into the ground briefly. This does not occur on PC.
•	Collections notifications are not sending you directly to the collection.


ACTION ITEMS
-	Update Player menu to group crown store & collection together


-	set custom position on hintbar for PREVIEW/BUNDLE DETAIL to seperate this option from the other available options
	-	This option should be shown at all times, and made dim if not available for the current selection
-	set custom position for PREVIOUS/NEXT controls on the hintbar when in preview mode
	-	Hide these controls when there's only a single item available for preview
-	Remove inventory capacity from hint bar
-	BUY CROWNS should be placed on the right edge of the screen
-	Tooltips
	-	Item names need to be shown in a single color - do not use color coding typically assigned to rarity
	-	Fix layout and positioning issues as addressed in my previous design feedback

Confirm Purchase Dialog
-	on dialog entry set list focus to PURCHASE (any items in the purchase will appear above this option)
-	items listed in this dialog need to use same color coding as in item tooltip

2015-03-08 16:34:24
Steps to reproduce:
1. Launch ESO on PS4/Xbox.
2. )setalliance 2
3. )createitem 27114 1 1 1, )createitem 36568 1 1 1
4. Quickslot the siege weapons.
5. Press up on the d-pad and select a siege weapon.
6. Press up again to bring up the ground target reticle.
7. Press and hold up again on the d-pad to change the selected quickslot item.
8. Attempt to press up to place the siege weapon.

Observed result:
If the player switches the quicksloted siege while the ground target is already up, then they will be unable to place the siege weapon. This does not happen on the PC. In order to close the ground target, the player then needs to attack/block/crouch/swap weapons.

Expected result:
Player is able to place a siege weapon if a quickslot selection is changed while the ground target reticle is up.

(test case simulates repetitive inventory management behavior found during long term gameplay)

2. )awardloottable 200 to populate inventory with a large number of items
3. open inventory menu
4. destroy every item in the inventory

Significant physical effort required, takes a long time

The inventory menu should provide a streamlined way to manage all items at a time

01_menu_view_all.png

A "View All" category replaces the "Supplies" category. Unsurprisingly, this category contains a list of all items in player inventory. Sort criteria & grouping is identical to item lists used in Vendor/Sell & Bank/Deposit

Items can be equipped, unequipped, used and assigned. The Action menu continues to provide contextual behaviors intrinsic to different item types

04_equip_menu.png

Items with a single target slot (helms, gloves, etc.) can be equipped directly by using the EQUIP keybind

There are a few issues with the Champion Screen that were captured as bugs, which required modification to the visual design (layout) to solve appropriately. Would like to do some additional cleanup to this screen as part of the bug fix

ESO-401674
describes a layout problem where the paging nav is disconnected from the actual behavior. Issue isn't resolved by simply placing the gamepad icons in the panel header as is done elsewhere - this is a different kind of screen. Solving this required abandoning the existing panel-type treatment and replacing with self contained tooltip-type panels. The description panel will need to be sized to fit conteent, and will invoke scrolling behavior when content is taller than the max height of the tooltip.




While rearranging panels, I consolidated the available & allocated point readouts into a single visual cluster.


2015-04-07 16:15:42
We should initialize this control with its boundaries set to the maximum value. Its too easy r

We have 2 choices here:

(1) scale the entire frame buffer to the bounds afforded by the resize control. This will prevent the overflow condition, and will effectively letterbox the entire screen into the requested boundaries

(2) go through the entire UI and modify every template to accomodate the overflow that will happen whenever the screen is sized smaller than the available display space.

My suggestion is that we look into option

2015-04-23 12:39:38

1. Briefly explain your role at ZOS
I'm the lead UI designer for the Elder Scrolls Online.
I created the visual language and designed the underlying systems to support a unified (and fun) console experience.
I work with other game designers, artists, engineers and QA to implement and evaluate gameplay features.


2. Why is the UI for console so different from PC?
People tend to play console games in a different environment than PC games, and of course the input devices are hugely different. We designed the interface to feel natural with a gamepad. When I'm on a PC, I'm 1 foot away from thescreen. I have numerous input methods available - at least 100 seperate buttons on the keyboard, and numerous inputs from the mouse. Over time I find myself slouching forward in my chair and sort of hovering over the control surfaces on my desk.

 In contrast to that, players tend to adopt a more relaxed posture in front of a game console and TV set. They play the game from a distance. The gamepad itself is a remarkable input device, but unlike a mouse and keyboard, there tends to be a travel time associated with navigation. For example, drag and drop is something you might take for granted with a mouse and keyboard. Its a very natural thing to do. Its surprisingly difficult to pull off with a game controller. The equivalent interaction for "take this thing and put it in some other place" (which we do a lot of) requires an alternate approach.

The PC amd console cl

We designed the interf


3. Will PC ever get to use console UI?
Potentially. We develop on PCs with gamepad support, however that's not quite yet ready for general purpose usage

4. Regarding VOIP, how are we handling different languages since our servers are multilingual?
We don't make any assumptions about different languages over VOIP.

5. Can you tell us anything you’re currently working on?
I am currently working on shipping the game and new features for release 7

6. Live Q&A

2015-05-18 11:24:57
lots of design in motion right now

Craft Bags Acceptance Criteria

Plus members will have an account shared craft bag that holds an enormous amount of crafting materials so that they no longer compete with regular items for inventory space.

-	Players can access the craft bag from any character (Account Shared)

-	Crafting materials that are looted or gathered automatically go into the craft bag

-	No effort should be on the player to utilize the bag
	-	It is automatically used when crafting
	-	The player can easily interact with items in the craft bag for activities such as  trade or to be posted to a guild store

-	When the player cancels their sub
	-	Items can still come out of the bag but cannot go in.
	-	The bag can be sorted and filtered based on crafting profession

-	The system supports selling this as a permanent unlock
	-	PD Note: by default this will be a subscriber only bonus, but it should be developed in such a way as to be convertible to a purchased unlock as well
	-	The craft bag appears for plus members and non-plus members but is only accessible to plus
	-	Non-plus members are informed of how the bag works and how to get it if they attempt to use the craft bag.
	-	A link to account management and plus purchase is provided to the player

2015-06-03 12:06:37

The new sorting algorithm that Ben put in creates a very specific layout, is that what we're using for the sorting in the default A-Z category?

No. I just want to list that content sorted from A-Z


For instance It puts featured items at the top but your design has the featured sub category at the top then A-Z with featured items also existing in their alphabetical location in the A-Z category.

That's correct. What I want to solve for is making "special" content more visible at a glance - however. If an item is shown as featured, I don't want that to mean it doesn't appear in its category's A-Z list. It should appear in both places




Further more, It's putting already purchased items at the bottom. I was curious if say for instance in the Featured tab which has seperated groups for New/Limited Time Offer/On Sale, should the already bought items go at the bottom of the entire thing with the A-Z stuff or should they go at the end of each subsequent category. What I mean by that is, If you've bought an item on Sale, does it show up in the On Sale group, if so is it at the end of that group, etc...


I'd prefer to leave purchased items where they would ordinarily fall.

Lastly, I wasn't sure what to do with the bundle attachment screen. It's usually a much smaller number of items and they aren't chunked up like the normal market stuff. Are we wanting to make the selected items still in the center of the screen?

Yes, scrolling behavior for that content should be consistent w the list in general - same special casing for when you are focused on items on row 1

FOR EVERYONE AT ZINDAGI

I started this project a year and a half ago with two questions. What are the narrative possibilities of scrolling? How does typography shape experience? Our work together revealed answers I'd never have imagined.

This has been the most demanding production I've worked on; Lots of moving parts, shifting requirements, impossible deadlines. Zindagi has been such a fantastic creative partner. I've admired your reliability, flexibility and sense of humor. You made it fun. Thank you.

UNABLE TO ACCESS GUILD BANK (NOT ENOUGH MEMBERS)

PLAYER LACKS PERMISSION TO WITHDRAW ITEMS FROM THE GUILD BANK

PLAYER LACKS PERMISSION TO WITHDRAW CURRENCY FROM THE GUILD BANK

THERE ARE NO ITEMS TO WITHDRAW OR DEPOSIT

Using a game controller brings the fluidity and responsiveness of the console UI to PC while retaining keyboard support for text chat, data entry and moving about the world.

SHIELD DYEING

2015-09-28 10:56:15
CROWN STORE PLAYER JOURNEY NOTES

Before attempting a user journey you should understand:
-	user goals
-	user motivations
-	current pain points
-	main tasks they want to achieve

The main thing a user journey should contain is a series of steps. It is up to you to decide how many you need to best represent the journey.

For each step, consider:
-	CONTEXT
	where is the user? what is around them? are there any external factors that may be distracting them?

-	PROGRESSION
	how does each step enable them to get to the next?

-	DEVICES

-	EMOTION
	are they engaged, bored, annoyed?

If the purpose of your user journey is to show the current state of affairs then make sure to highlight any changes to pain points which a future solution will solve. If it is to show the future state then think of ways which an ideal world could look, highlighting the benefits to the user and the business.

2015-10-13 10:09:54
spoke w Robbie about group revives during raids
narrative conceit
-	reviving hurts the group
-	its as if the "revive" button was electrified
	-	each time a group member revives, everyone feels a bit of pain

mechanical
-	the penalty for reviving is that a bonus pool is depleted every time a group member revives
-	this bonus pool is used as a multiplier to a base score to derive a final score
	-	the final score is what is shown on the leaderboard
	-	depleting the bonus pool reduces the final score
-	center screen messaging is used to show additional points gained upon boss kill
-	should

Soul Reservoir
Controls the display of the soul reservoir. When automatic display is selected the soul reservoir will only appear in useful situations like when the soul count changes


Group Revive Counter
Controls the display of the group revive counter. When automatic display is selected the revive counter only appears when a group member revives.


2015-10-21 10:16:35
PORTABLE FENCE DESIGN

- The Portable Fence cannot clear your bounty.
- The Portable Fence cannot launder goods; you can only sell your stolen stuff to it.
- When you sell goods to the Portable Fence, you get less money than if you sold to a proper, stationary Fence. (The amount of the cut is data-defined.)
- All mention of Cooldowns has been removed. Future Assistants, like the Portable Banker and Vendor, won’t need it – and the Portable Fence has other limitations that encourage the player to use the proper Fences now. So, why spend time making something we’d use once, if then?
- Portable Fences specifically draw on the same ‘pool’ of items that you can sell to Fences in a day.
- I’ve added a line or two mentioning that we’d like to do a Portable Banker and Portable Vendor in the future. The exact designs of those are TBD, of course, but they should be kept in mind as we start developing this tech.
- I added a note to the Art section about the Backpack Scamp that Mike Phillips mentioned, noting it as a good candidate to become the Portable Fence NPC.

ACTIVATABLE COLLECTIBLE

INITIAL PROPOSAL

	A way to sell "usable Abilities" from the store
	TOYS
		players get these for completing public dungeons

	UTILITY FEATURES
		can be assigned to Quickslot
		can be cast repeatedly from quickslot interaction

	These toys/utiloties are stored in the Collection UI
	??? What Categories?
		TOYS
			Fireworks
			Lanterns/Lights (Almalexia's Lantern)
		UTILITIES
		NOVELTIES
		ACTIONS

	How they work:

	When a player uses an activatable collectible, the ability plays out fully as if a player had cast it

	A player can slot the ability into a Quickslot from the collection ui

	When used, the ability shows a cooldown timer
		-	in the quickslot UI
		-	in the collection UI

	How does a player know what an activatable collectible can do?
		-	tooltip description



EMPOWERED TROPHY (LATEST DESIGN)
Public dungeon reward trophies and any other such items (toys, utilities) would be moved into the Collections UI under a new category

The design doc explicitly calls out UI requirements:
	Active/cooling down/inactive indicators Empowered Trophy Collectibles.

The items fire an Ability when used
	The Ability initiates as normal and plays out until completed
		The UI shows the cooldown or in-use state of the item to prevent it from being re-triggered until its ready again
	The item can be assigned to a quickslot for convenient triggering
		The icon in the quickslot shows the cooldown/in-use state

Items can be triggered from the Collection UI
	Exists within new Collectible Category
		TROPHY

Items can be assigned to a Quickslot from the Collection UI
Items can be triggered from the Quickslot interaction
Items have these states:
	Active (ready)
	Cooling Down (waiting for ready)
	Inactive (gated)



How do I gain empowered trophies?
	-	Reward from Public Dungeon
	-	Purchased from Crown Store

How do I use empowered trophies
	-	Directly from Collection UI
	-	From Quickslot

How are empowered trophies assigned to Quickslot

How do I know when I can use an empowered trophy?
	-	It appears in the READY state

How do I know when I can't use an empowered trophy
	-	It appears in the COOLDOWN state
	-	It may appear in the GATED state
		-	Why is it gated?
			-	Gated condition is described on item toolt

2016-01-14 11:49:15
working on documenting purchase process for DLC

2 Cases: Customers & Members
-	Customers purchase DLC to own
-	Members gain access to DLC upon its release as a membership benefit
	-	Access to DLC is lost if membership lapses
	-	Members can purchase DLC to own

PURCHASE FLOW

	CUSTOMER
		-	Purchase the product
		-	Congratulations!
		// is this a dialog, or is this accomplished by taking players to the DLC collection UI after transaction complete?
			-	Describe DLC intro quest
			-	Allow player to accept DLC intro quest
		-	Remind player that DLC quests can be started from the Collection screen at any time
		// could this reminder be integrated into the Player menu?
		// a tooltip (from the Crown Store menu item) ?
		// a dedicated information area integrated into the menu list itself?


	MEMBER
		-	Product is released
		// is this a dialog or announcement?
		// instead could this information be integrated into the Player Menu?
		-	New member benefits!
			-	line item: DLC product unlocked
			-	Remind player that DLC quests can be started from the Collection screen at any time
		-	Unlock Permanently
			-	Option available in collections UI
			-	Option available in Store UI: DLC category
		-	Membership Lapsed
			-	opportunity to renew membership now
			-	can unlock content permanently to keep playing

NEW-NESS
The player menu reacts when new products have been pushed to the store since the previous login
-	The store has been updated with new products
-	Expiration of limited time offers shouldn't affect new-ness

The New flag stays visible until all new items have been looked at.
-	However, we want brand-new items to look different than items youve just not looked at yet
-	So, the new flag has 2 states: brand new, and new (or dim)

New-ness carries over to product tiles
-	New product tiles should look visually distinct
-	Update the product framing template to accomodate

3024-001080-2747


For Customers
the Store Menu Item shows the NEW flag
For Members, the Collections Menu Item shows the NEW flag

2016-02-11 22:03:14
2 kinds of Loot Crate
- Daily Packages
	- Intended to drive players to the Crown Store on a regular basis
	- The Daily Package can be purchased for free once a day
	- When the Player has a daily package available for pickup the UI should call this out
- Crown Crates
	- provide players an avenue for getting exclusive Crown Products
	- Crown Crates will be offered in 1x, 5x, 10x, and 50x bundles

Crown Store, Gem Section
showcase all of the in season items as well as the discontinued items
Out of season items will not appear for purchase and will only reappear when they are back in season.
In addition, variants of some of the more desirable Mounts, Pets, and Costumes will be available through the Crown Gem section of the store exclusively. An example of this would be a Nightmare Courser variant with blue flames instead of red flames.

2016-02-16 13:00:48
Pain Points that currently have Crown Store Offerings

The player dies and they do not have a valid Soul Gem to resurrect - Crown Soul Gem

The player fills their bag to capacity – Crown Bag Space Upgrade

The player fills their bank to capacity – Crown Bank Space Upgrade

The player has a Crafting Style selected, but does not have any of the appropriate style items  in their inventory/bank - Crown Mimic Stone

The player is at a respec shrine (Skill/Attribute), but does not have enough gold to commit the respect – Crown Attribute/Skill Respec Scroll

The player's gear has degraded to a point in which it is no longer viable for combat and they don't have enough gold or repair kits to repair it - Crown Repair Kit

The player’s weapon enchantment has depleted and they do not have a valid Soul Gem to charge it - Crown Soul Gem

The player visits a stable and doesn’t have enough gold to purchase a mount – Crown Mounts

The player visits a stable and is on cooldown for when they can next upgrade their mount Crown Riding Lessons

2016-02-18 18:31:25
good wireframe for PC search behavior



Search provides a different view into the store. Customers are actively seeking instead of browsing. The redesigned feature supports this by aggregating content instead of categorizing
Show actionable bundled relationships

Bundled relationships
Create purchase opportunities in search results
The search algorithm is thorough in finding keyword matches. In cases where a bundled item matches the keyword, the entire product bundle is returned as a search result. Within that bundle you can sometimes find a product that is independently purchasable. It appears elsewhere in the store. Its also inside this bundle. This particular product might not even match the search keyword - it just happens to be inside a bundle that does match the keyword. We call these actionable bundled items. Including them in our search results creates an opportunity for purchase and also discovery.





The feature empasizes discovery as well as findability. The new text-based item listing shows products as an easy to read flat list.

PAIN POINTS THAT CURRENTLY HAVE CROWN STORE OFFERINGS
- Crown Soul Gem. The player dies and they do not have a valid Soul Gem to resurrect
	CONSOLE
	- add keybind to BACK button to purchase Crown Gem
	- add XP meter to this screen
	PC
	- same solution as CONSOLE
	- map purchase Crown Gem prompt to the P key

- Crown Bag Space Upgrade
	The player fills their bag to capacity



- Crown Bank Space Upgrade
	The player fills their bank to capacity – ()
- Crown Mimic Stone
	The player has a Crafting Style selected, but does not have any of the appropriate style items in their inventory/bank
- Crown Attribute/Skill Respec Scroll
	The player is at a respec shrine (Skill/Attribute), but does not have enough gold to commit the respect –
- Crown Repair Kit - The player's gear has degraded to a point in which it is no longer viable for combat and they don't have enough gold or repair kits to repair it -
- Crown Soul Gem - The player’s weapon enchantment has depleted and they do not have a valid Soul Gem to charge it -
- Crown Mounts - The player visits a stable and doesn’t have enough gold to purchase a mount –
- Crown Riding Lessons - The player visits a stable and is on cooldown for when they can next upgrade their mount

PAIN POINTS THAT DO NOT CURRENTLY HAVE CROWN STORE OFFERINGS
- Fast Travel - The cost to fast travel has grown to a point where the player can no longer afford it – (Buy to fast travel)
- Speed up research - Player has to wait a ridiculously long time to research a trait - (Buy it now)
- Group Repair Kit - Groups armor has degraded so badly in a Raid or Group Dungeon that it is no longer viable for them to continue. One player wants to repair the Groups gear
- Buy stack of refined materials - Player visits a durables crafting station and has no refined resources to make anything
- Bounty Remover - Player gets caught with a bounty that they cannot pay – (Crown Bounty Remover)

2016-03-07 16:14:35
2 pathways into easing friction.
1. Pre-gated
2. Post-gated

accidental
(after the gated condition is triggered)
- instead of showing gated condition, offer a choice to do something about it

deliberate
(before the gated condition is triggered)
- provide option to reduce friction up front, before gated condition is triggered

2016-03-07 19:05:22
Bag and bank space from the bank is going to be a bit more complex - 2 possible currencies. Don't get caught up on that one now


GAMEPAD
Two pathways to ease friction
- Before a gated condition (pre-gated)
- Upon encountering a gated condition (post-gated)
	- Typically, this is the "inventory is full" condition
	- a dialog appears offering the appropriate upgrade

Upgrade prompts only appear within menus or existing navigation
Upgrade prompts never appear as keybinds
- except for Death Recap, where they have to

Bag and Bank upgrades can be purchased with crowns or gold



Gamepad upgrade prompts typically appear as menu items
PC upgrade promnpts typically appear as keybinds

- more generally, want to act upon anything in the announcement dialog immediately
- the more immediate case is that an event token is being placed into player inventory, which must be then navigated to and used
1. events should be activatable with a single prompt
2. event (products) should provide consistent prompts wherever shown
3. Maybe events aren't shown in the Product announcement dialog
	- maybe these are a unique kind of announcement

Product Announcement Dialog - Why so awkward?
- intrusive
- chunky, but not chunky enough - should be treated as a full height panel similar
	- what if it was a vertical panel?
- non-repeatable
- had previously explored idea of placing that announcement in a navigable panel attached to the player menu

2016-05-04 15:04:44
the difference nbetween promotion and description

 - go head to head with other players in a Bloon-popping battle for victory. From the creators of best-selling Bloons TD 5, this all new Battles game is specially designed for multiplayer combat, featuring over 20 custom head-to-head tracks, incredible towers and upgrades, all-new attack and defense boosts, and the ability to control bloons directly and send them charging past your opponent's defenses.

It's a surreal mix of classical visual novels, odd choices, cyberpunk, mysticism and everyday life of a man lost in a rapidly changing reality.

You'll see the game, inspired by the numerous arthouse films, postmodern literature and dreams that come closer to dawn.

It's monkey vs monkey for the first time ever. This game is the memory of the games that have never existed.
Features:

150 background images, some of them are animated, made in the old-school pixel art
Graphics, based on a simulation of the old systems and monitors (mostly on the Commodore 64 and MSX)
Dive into the crazy world full of mysticism and cyberpunk
The atmospheric and varied music (40 songs)
The total duration of the game: more than 4 hours
Just read, watch, listen to and ponder the riddles of the game world

2016-06-01 07:49:10
getting ready for comparitive analysis presentation

News

statement: I analyzed several game sites to understand how different types of content were deployed to meet customer experience goals. These categories are broad.

Fanservice
-	editorial content describing back story and gameplay mechanics
-	useful for onboarding
Promotion
-	editorial content used to promote existing or upcoming products
-	for existing products this should be followed by a call to action (to buy now)
-	for upcoming products, this may serve as a lead in for Fanservice
Shopping
-	purchase of digital assets, physical assets or various entitlements
Customer Service
-	provides information and functionality to meet the needs of various customers
	-	change languag
Account management
-	provides a direct relationship between customers and and the business
Community
-	user generated content
-	promotional content dedicated for users

2016-06-06 14:02:46
free associating more user stories:

Why should I buy the Imperial Edition?
Why are there so many ways to return to the home page?
I want to read about the latest game release (DLC)
I just read about The Dark Brotherhood where do I buy it

When I buy Crown Packs I feel like I'b being taken to a 3rd party site and I have to think about how to return to where Its frustrating to see Crown Store Items that I can't purchase
Why is a full featured Crown Store included on the site?
I want to know what's new on the crown store
I want to know if there are limited time offers on the Crown Store

I've heard about different game events that run from time to time, how do I participate?
I want to see a calendar of game events so I can decide to participate ahead of time
What's coming up on ESO Live? Is there a calendar?

What are Crowns?
Why should I become an ESO Member?
What is the benefit of having a larger crafting inventory?
Why is a 10% experience gain valuable?
Why should I care about a crafting inspiration gain, I'm not even sure what that is
More gold always sounds good, what can I do with it?
I want to be able to see relevant information at a glance instead of going somewhere else
As an art director I want for web properties to reflect the visual language of the game
As an art director, I don't want to cover hero images with text
As an art director I want to communicate using consistent typography
As a customer I want to be informed where I'm looking instead of an external page
As a customer, I'm accustomed to scrolling. I prefer it to paging
As a customer I expect the sections of a website to share a uniform style

2016-06-06 15:19:22
external entry points from Console:
-	Customer Service menu points player for further info to help.elderscrollsonline.com
-	Terms of Service points player to accounts.elderscrollsonline.com

As a gamer and a customer there are too many things to look at, I always feel like I might be missing something
As a business I want top level site navigation to relate to my business goals
As a customer I like it when the navigation stays the same in different parts of the site
As a customer who has signed in, I want to know that I am signed in at all times
As a content creator I need a structured method for authoring microsite content
As a new customer I expect to buy the game after reading promotional content

As a gamer I cant find anything in the media section
As a customer I feel the prompt to "check out items in the crown store" is disingenuous. I can't act on it.
As a gamer I cant read long form editorial comfortably. The text and layout are hard to read
As a gamer when I'm reading long form content I dont want to be distracted by other content

As a customer it confused me that when I read a guide the site menu tells me I'm reading the news. Where am I?

As a content creator I want microsite content to use shared navigation
As a new customer I can't read the game overview. Its hard to read.
As an art director when I use big images they need room to breathe. Its geometry.

As an art director I expect external properties to share common visual characteristics

As a content creator I expect content to be easily readable on an iPhone
As a customer I expect to navigate media galleries on my iphone by swiping through it
As a customer I find it hard to navigate long lists as a grid
As a customer I find it exhausting to page through long lists of content, let me scroll instead
As a fan its not easy to find historical content
As a fan I need a way to share ESO editorial content with my social network(s)
As a customer I expect to be able to buy any version of the game in the Store
As a gamer I want to see the current leaderboards and emperor
As a gamer, I want fun and practical tools available on the site
As a producer I want a shared Splunk dashboard with flexible reporting to validate design goals
As a customer I want to see activity from my social networks on the site, its news to me
As a gamer I want my forum account to be more flexible - linked to FB, User Account or Email
As a twitch user I want to see the channel streamlined to access ESO live content by index
As a twitch user I want to see current promotional material
As a customer I want a single destination for gamne purchase
As a returning customer I want to personalize the site
As a content creator I want to create content from a template
As a new customer I want to understand what the game can offer me
As a new customer when I choose buy now I expect to be offered the best edition of the game
As a content creator I need a diagram of the update cycle
As a new customer I want to buy the PC game as easily as the console game
As a new customer I don't want to create an account so I can purchase the game
As a new customer I don't mind answering a few questions about setting up an account while I wait for the Patcher to download
As a new customer I don't mind answering a few questions about setting up an account when I first launch the Patcher
As a new customer a New Player guide is useful reference (this material currently exists on a forum post)
As a customer/visitor I want to hide any system alerts when they appear
As a customer/vistor to the Forums I want to sort forum listings by the provided headers
As a customer/visitor to the Forums I want to scroll through long listings instead of paging through them
As a customer/vistor to the Forums I want to share with my other social networks
As a customer I want to be able to change my account password any time I want to
As a customer I don't understand why I should buy Crowns until I've played the game for a while
As a customer I would understand the value of membership if the benefits were surfaced as Products

2016-06-10 10:56:39
This is a good way to present findings

CHALLENGE
-	the top 3 customer challenges
SOLUTION
-	the top 3 features that you provide to solve the customer problem
KEY METRICS
-	the top 3 activities that you measure and their measurable goals
UNIQUE VALUE PROPOSITION
-	A single clear and compelling ,essage that explains why your solution is unique and worth buying
COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGE
-	A unique set of strengths tha can not easily be copied
SALES CHANNELS
-	The paths used to reach customers
CUSTOMER SEGMENTS
-	Target customers

2016-06-13 17:07:44
generate raw list of design directions

Unified site navigation
-	constantly being placed in parts of the site where I cant return home
-	place emphasis on menu items that are game-related
-	Use the mobile top menu as a starting point.
-	Fewer options = easier to process
-	Move non-game related items to a secondary footer area
-	Remove all submenus
	-	those options can be exposed at the destination page
	-	Creates an unnatural behavior on my iPhone
-	Persist top-level across all game-related areas of the site
	-	Forums
	-	Account
	-	Support

Unify Typography across all content types

Unify Graphic Thumbnail treatments across all content types
-	Dont cover images with text
	-	hard to read
	-	devalues art direction
	-	limits visual formatting choices
		-	makes all content look the same
	-	Introduce a mini-thumbnail size
	-	Dont always use thumbnails to list editorial content

Rotate the sidebar 90 degrees
-	May work as horizontal structure
	-	reduce dependency on special-case responsive layout for mobile
-	Expose sidebar content as carousel
	-	multiple carousels?
-	Leave room for vertically oriented page content to breath

Unified storefront
-	Sell all game products products the same place
	-	Show me all the ways I can get the game
	-	Direct me to digital downloads first
		-	Steam?
			-	Is it possible to redirect to Steam purchase from Web?
		-	PlayStation Store
		-	XBox Marketplace
-	Sell ESO Plus from a dedicated landing page (minisite)
-	Sell Crowns from a dedicated product page (minisite)
-	Include a BUY NOW prompt in all Promo content including minisites
-	Buy Crowns anywhere

Unified Indexing
-	provide functionality for browsing archives of editorial content (news, media, guides, broadcasts)
	-	browse by subject
	-	browse by date
	-	browse by popularity
-	for Forum Content lists, enable sort by list header
	-	Subject
	-	Author
	-	Replies
	-	Views
	-	Most Recent
-	Allow customization for logged in Fans(?)
	-	custom categories

Infinite Scroll
-	Don't use pagination to organize or navigate content
-	Use a "Load More" prompt to append content to current listing
-	News Archive
-	Media Archive
	-	Media archive already does this
	-	Layout and UX issues

Crowns as a Service
-	Sell Crowns from a dedicated product page (minisite)
-	Provide onboarding for what Crowns are
-	Provide Loot Crate onboarding
-	Show relative value of Crown Packs
-	Buy Crowns for other Players
-	Place Crown Purchase CTA in page footer
-	If I'm signed in, show me my crown balance

Evangelize Community
-	Provide space on the landing page for community content
-	Provide link to ZOS Twitch in page footer
-	Include feeds from ZOS Twitter, Instagram, Facebook
-	Provide exposure to next episode of ESO Live on landing page
-	If a fan wins a contest we run, thats front page news
-	Personalities are Sticky
	-	Editorial, bio and backstory for featured fans
		-	streamers
		-	addon makers
		-	fansite creators
		-	Guilds
	-	Editorial, bio and backstory for public faces of the company
	-	Editorial, bio and backstory for featured devs and staff
-	Make editorial content easy to share on external channels
	-	Provide badges and well-formed share templates for every post
		-	Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest

Community Hub
-	Create a dedicated Community page
-	Includes feeds from ZOS external channels
-	ESO live event calendar
-	Editorial content for next ESO Live
-	Emphasize personalities
	-	Host bios (Jessica, Gina)
	-	Guest bios (devs)
	-	Featured fan bios
-	Emphasize what others are doing with the game
	-	Player surveys
	-	Player Art
	-	Cosplay
-	Provide space to feature any public outreach and appearances
	-	Trade Shows
	-	Guild Summit
	-	Fan Conventions
-	Make content easy to find by indexing it
	-	By event
	-	By year
	-	By person
-	Promote Crown Store Events
-	Guild features

Community Management
-	ESO live content on Twitch needs richer metadata
	-	Title should include name of guest(*s) or subject
	-	Use same video descriptions as YouTube content
-	ESO live content on YouTube needs richer metadata
	-	Title should include name of guest(s) or subject
-	How do we currently police commentary on external channels?
	-	Hate speech
	-	Bullying

Evangelize Onboarding
-	Guides aren't News, categorize them seperately
-	Communicate the intrinsic/extrinsic value of Crowns on a dedicate Crown Pack page
-	All Onboarding should branch out from a single "Player Guides" page
-	Convert New Player Guide found in the Forums into a Quickstart Guide
-	Provide a link to New Player Guide from Patcher
-	Curate and categorize existing guide content
-	Prepare a guide for Loot Crates

Don't replicate Crown Store
-	Unable to act on the content we're currently showing
-	Let's reduce dependency on keeping the web UI in sync with Crown Store
-	Can sell Crown Packs more effectively using other methods
-	Show relevant Store Content only
		-	Special Offers
		-	Crown Events
		-	Arrival of seasonal Loot Crates
-	Use a dedicated "Crowns as a Service" page to communicate value of products
-	Only communicate the value of the products that sell the most


Unified purchase flow
-	Sell all game products using the same purchase flow
-	Don't make me create an account before buying PC game
	-	Let me purchase as guest and request only billing credentials
	-	Follow the model we use for Steam, where a code is provided and entered upon a seperate account creation process
	-	Move the rest of the account flow to after purchase
		-	How does ESO account creation work from Steam Purchase? What is that flow?
		-	ideally this would take place in game as it does on console
	-	Get the game, and get into the game as smoothly as possible.

Unified login
-	Single sign on to the site with Facebook or email authentication
-	Game account is linked to this unified login
-	Single login persists across all site activities
	-	Forums
	-	Customer Service
	-	Account Management
	-	Game Purchase
	-	Crown Purchase
	-	ESO Plus Membership
-	Buy Crowns for other Players

Layout and Visual Language
-	The site is overly dense
-	Overall Typography needs to be reconsidered
	-	Readability suffers for long form content
	-	Type usage is mixed across the platform, needs standardization

Account management anywhere
-	I should be encouraged to sign in to my account
-	Basic account profile should be exposed as a persistent feature
	-	accessible as an overlay
	-	provides common account functions (TBD) for logged in users
		-	Show linked products
		-	Change Password
		-	Account Status
		-	Crown Balance
		-	Visit Account Page
		-	sign in/out

Redesign Game Overview page
-	inconsistent responsive layout
-	readability issues
- 	text competes with images instead of reinforcing
-	mobile usability issues for content in horizontal carousel
-	cluttered at certain sizes
-	updated art direction to match look and feel of the site

Fancy Lightbox
-	Carousel viewer with support for arbitrary content types
	-	images
	-	video
	-	text
	-	HTML wrapper
-	Provide visual affordances for a more tactile experience
	-	show prev/next images in the list when viewport is wide enough to support
	-	show horizontal scrollbar when list animates
-	Support drag to scroll
	-	this is primary navigation method for mobile
-	Includes social badges for sharing to FB, Twitter, Pinterest

Curate Everything
-	Curation allows mixed content types grouped around a theme
-	Grouping by theme makes individual content types stickier
-	Support all Editorial and Media Content types
	-	News
	-	Guides
	-	Deep Dives
	-	Videos
	-	Screenshots
-	Curated content appears in Packages
	-	Unique Name
	-	Unique Banner Image
	-	Unique Thumbnail
	-	Package Description
	-	Curated by (name)
-	Packages have 3 views
	-	line item
	-	thumbnail view
	-	page
-	Create dedicated template for page view

Modern Patcher
-	provides links to onboarding material on elderscrollsonline.com
-	remove news feed
-	Combine launcher and game options into single menu
-	Devote majority screen space to hero imagery
-	Place emphasis on art direction and image quality
	-	This is the first view of the product many users have
-	Reinforce in-game visual language
-	Any Marketing calls to action must point to relevant subject matter


Unified Visual Language
Establish site-wide framing for common page types
Reduce weight of framing system to support modular design
Establish typographical usage standards across all site areas
Change the font
Modular layout grid
Set standard sizes for images used across all site areas
banners
primary feature
secondary feature
list
gallery
thumbnails
Standard placement of controls, such as social badges or navigation widgets
Replace the logo in the page header with non-stacked version or simple mark
The Forum page needs to be restyled to match color scheme and typography of the overall site
Account management and Support pages must share standard site header for navigation

Readability Improvement
-	Not all content needs to be in a box
-	By default, don't cover images with text, place text beneath
-	Establish typographical usage standards across all site areas
-	Don't use Futura font for body text


What about my iphone
Fluid layout improvements
Establish better breakpoint strategies for variable screen widths
Include standard mobile interactions for selection and scrollong
Don't hide Buy Now prompt in a collapsed menu on my iPhone
Reward widescreen views by showing more secondary content

Sticky Interactions
-	Interactive features are a major driver for return visits
	-	World Status
	-	Character Status
	-	Calculators
	-	Toys
		-	GIF-maker
		-	Meme generator
	-	Sort/Filter content listings
	-	Gifting
	-	Sharing
-	Recommend/rate/review fansites that already offer interactive features

Navigation
As a Designer I don't want items in a grid to show text on top of the images
As a Designer I expect all areas of the site to share a common visual design
As a Designer I prefer not to cover images with text unless it makes the content easier to read

As a Fan I don't mind signing in if doing so lets me customize the way I engage with the site
As a Fan I rely upon all areas of the site to share common navigation
As a Producer I rely upon all areas of the site to share common navigation

Shopping
As a Business we need to incentivize Crown purchases by providing services not available in-game
As a Business we need to make Crown Purchase available from anywhere on the site
As a Business we need to offer digital download of the console game through first party web storefronts
As a Business we need to provide New Customers with better comparisons of membership vs ownership
As a Business we should guide players to make the Best purchase by default
As a Business we want to reduce the number of steps it takes to purchase the game
As a Business we would like to get New Customers in the game as soon as possible

As a New Customer I don't want to create an account so I can purchase the game. Just take my money
As a New Customer I need to see a side by side comparison of the standard game vs Imperial Edition
As a New Customer I need to understand the value of Crowns before I'll purchase them

As a New Customer I want to buy the PC game as easily as the console game
As an New Customer I don’t like getting stuck in the store when I try to buy the PC Game
As an Owner I want to buy Crowns as a gift for my friend
As an Owner I want to see how many Crowns I already  have when I purchase them
As an Owner if I can click on a product, I expect the choice to buy it now
As a Producer I want to create a minisite to position Crown Pack Purchases as a service

2016-06-16 09:13:13
A Fan is anyone who visits the site. Maybe they’re a customer, maybe not.
A New Customer is someone who is purchasing, or has just purchased the game
An Owner is an existing customer who has purchased the game and created an account
A Designer is a stakeholder who is responsible for visual language and continuity
A Producer is a stakeholder who writes, curates or schedules content
The Business role is a generic term for measurable stakeholder business interests

2016-06-21 07:14:05
6 more entries remain

As a Fan I want to view curated content
As a Fan I want to find the best content without having to look too hard
As a Fan I want to find older content more easily
As a Fan I need additional ways to sort the content. I don't always want a chronologically sorted grid of thumbnails
As a Fan I need additional ways to sort the content. I don't always want a chronologically sorted grid of thumbnails
As a Producer I want to make the best news easy to find
As a Producer I want to make the best media easy to find
As a Fan visiting the Forums I want to sort forum listings by the provided headers
As a Fan I need additional ways to sort the content. I don't always want a chronologically sorted grid of thumbnails
As a Fan I want to find the best content without having to look too hard
As a Fan I rely upon all areas of the site to share common navigation
As an Fan who signs in to the site I want to be able to personalize the site

As a Fan I rely upon all areas of the site to share common navigation
As an Fan who signs in to the site I want to be able to personalize the site
As a Business we would like to get New Customers in the game as soon as possible
As a Business we need to make Crown Purchase available from anywhere on the site
As an Owner I want to buy Crowns as a gift for my friend
As an Owner I want to see how many Crowns I already  have when I purchase them
As a Business I want to know how Console and PC Owners engage differently with the site
As a Business we need the ability to track users using a single login that works across the site
As a Business we need to be able to identify site visitors as Owners
As a Fan I don't mind signing in if doing so lets me customize the way I engage with the site
As a Fan I would probably sign in to to use the site if I could sign in with Facebook
As a Fan I want more flexibility how I register to use the Forums
As a Fan who has taken time to create an account to use the site, I only want to sign in once
As an Owner once I've logged in I expect to see my account options in the primary navigation
As an Owner I want to redeem registration codes anywhere on the site when I'm logged in
As an Owner I expect to be prompted once for a login that works across all areas of the site
As an Owner I want to have access to common account management functions from the primary navigation
As a Owner I want to change my account credentials at any time
As an Owner I want to link my Account ID with a Facebook ID because its easier to sign with that
As an Owner I don't want to sign in for Support if I've previously signed in somewhere else
As an Owner I expect for my account login to enroll me in the Forums
As an Owner I expect for my account login to enroll me in the Forums
As an Owner if I can click on a product, I expect the choice to buy it now

talking points

GRID
adaptive to multiple devices, Based on modification to existing grid

TYPOGRAPHY
replaced all paragraph text w open sans for readability  (is open source font in common usage on the web)
standardized font size, sizes and line heights

CONTRAST RATIO. How black is black? Can you see the difference between pasted site content (menu,footer), compared to . Insead we need to start from a brighter black - improve contrast ratio, aid readability, provide

EMPHASIS ON BACKGROUND
Fullscreen background image
strong seperation between content and bkg
revealed by scrolling
opportunities for storytelling - transitions between muliple background, or parallax motion

HIERARCHY
named areas: T0, T1, T2, Feed Gallery, sidebar
content in the sidebar is smaller than in the main page area
use confluence to show different tier views

PROMOTION
Always promoting Buy More Crowns - linked to the current promotion when possible
T0 content area always selling the game (unless its a free play event)

COMMUNITY
Pin community content under T1 content block
- show example in Confluence


FRAMING
hilite captures entire content block

RESPONSIVE LAYOUT
how does content respond to different page widths & heights. what happens to the sidebar, for example

starting Buy Crowns design and getting caught up with previous research

CROWNS AS A SERVICE
Sell Crown Packages from a dedicated page. Include the Buy Crowns prompt in the site footer.
- Buy Crowns at any time
- Show Crown Balance when signed in
- Crown store onboarding
- Loot Crate onboarding

UX FAIL
We're prompting players to purchase crowns when they want to purchase or investigate items
The crown purchase prompt leads to a specific package - which may be far more than what a player needs
Players can't see crown balance
Players can't buy crowns for other players
Menu prompt to Crown Store is vague
Crown Store construct is questionable (this is the page that being replaced)

2016-07-26 14:38:15
What are crowns used for? What can you buy with Crowns

THE CROWN STORE
The Crown Store is an in-game store which allows for the purchasing of exclusive content, such as items and DLC. Crowns are the currency required to buy things from the store, and can be purchased separately or obtained by paying for an ESO Plus subscription

	Welcome ESO Plus Members
	Members receive 1500 crowns every month at the start of the subscription period. Read more about MEMBER BENEFITS

	Not a member? Become an ESO Plus™ member now for immediate access to new game content as well as other great benefits. Learn more about ESO PLUS™

ESO PLUS Members receive 1500 crowns every month at the start of the subscription period
500 Crowns are given to all accounts with a copy of the game

MOUNTS
Mounts are almost essential for crossing the vast expanses of Tamriel in good time. Several mounts are available for purchase with in-game gold or Crowns.You can train your character's Riding Skill every 20 hours at stablemasters, or as often as you like via the Crown Store, to receive a bonus to speed, inventory space, or stamina (up to the maximum of 60 points in each stat).  Mounts can be horses, guar, senche, camels, wolves, or bears.


PETS
Pets are companion creatures that follow the player. They are account wide vanity items and don't help in combat. Some of the pets were available as loyalty rewards given for a certain number of months of paid subscription, and some are purchases available from the Crown Store. Others are only available from various promotions. The only pet available from standard gameplay is Razak's Opus, although several can be earned in a similar fashion by completing DLC content or as DLC loyalty rewards.

COSTUMES
Costumes (including hats) are appearance only outfits that overlay armor. ESO Plus subscribers can dye their costumes.

CRAFTING
Learn how to craft in a wide range of exotic or Imperial styles and pourchase mimic stones which take the place of any racial item, allowing you to create items in any styles you've learned

DYES (Exclusive to ESO PLUS)
Players with active ESO Plus memberships can customize equipped costumes and hats at any Dye Station in the game, using the clothing dyes you've unlocked by completing in-game Achievements. Dyed costumes and hats are saved individually for each of your characters, so the same piece can have a different appearance for each of your characters. (become an ESO Plus Member)

UPGRADES
Play as an Imperial. Play as a vampire or a werewolf. Increase your storage space. Get riding Lessons for your mount
Add an assistant that can be summoned at any time

DLC
New story content and gameplay features. DLC in Elder Scrolls Online can be obtained by purchasing it in the Crown Store. All DLC in the game is free to access for players who have a current ESO Plus subscription, however if the subscription ends or lapses access is lost until it is renewed.

LOOT CRATES
Loot Crates give players an avenue for acquiring highly desirable and/or discontinued Crown products. Loot Crates are stored on the players account (not in their inventory). When a Loot Crate is opened, the player will be presented with a random set of items related to past, present, and never before seen products on the Crown Store. The higher the value of an item, the more rarely it is found, but the crate will always contain items with a total value greater than or equal to its cost.


1. Costumes
2. Crafting
3. DLC
4. Dyes
5. Loot Crates
6. Mounts
7. Pets
8. Upgrades

2016-09-01 20:18:03
working on design schematic

The Patcher is the first contact with the game for all PC customers. While the game has become more refined, the Patcher has not.
- Provide links to onboarding material
- Remove news feed (?)
- Combine launcher and game options into single menu
- Devote majority screen space to hero image

As a New Customer the New Player Guide is important to me
As a New Customer I want to understand how the game works
As a Producer I want the New Player Guide to be a destination that other channels link to
As a New Customer I need to be guided to the Game Overview
As a New Customer I would like to be directed to a New Player Guide from the Patcher
As a Producer I want the New Player Guide to be a destination for New Owners

As a Business we need to provide actionable prompts from any marketing materials shown in the Patcher
As a Designer I need to provide a link to the game website from any collateral

As a Designer I want to combine Patcher Options and Game options into a single Options menu

As an Owner I only need to see news in the Patcher about things that affect the Patcher (outages, updates)
As a Producer I would like to remove dependencies on updating the same content in different places

As a Producer I need to provide a link to the website from the Patcher
